backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the boutique backend with product CRUD operations (add, get, update, delete, filter by category/new arrivals/offers/search), user profile management, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single completed feature: replacing the jewel-tone color scheme with a new unified visual palette across all frontend components, pages, and config files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short human-readable summaries describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component and page.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (background, foreground, primary, border, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) using OKLCH-style numeric values.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell entry point for the Vite app, setting the page title to "Dali's Boutique" and mounting the React app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, sarees, jewelry, handbags, offers, product detail, admin, search) and wraps them in a Layout with CartProvider, Header, Footer, CartDrawer, and Chatbox.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI component with a shield icon and a back-to-home button, styled with teal/champagne colors for unauthorized route access.
frontend/src/components/CartDrawer.tsx: Slide-in Sheet cart drawer that displays cart items with quantity controls, remove buttons, and a subtotal footer, consuming items and actions from CartContext.
frontend/src/components/Chatbox.tsx: A floating chat widget for Dali's Boutique that provides keyword-based bot responses about sarees, pricing, shipping, and returns, with quick-reply buttons and a typing indicator.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying brand info, shop navigation links, customer care links, and contact details in a four-column teal-themed layout.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, search form, cart icon, and Internet Identity login/logout, conditionally showing an Admin link for admin users.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product as a card with image, badges for new/sale status, price, and a hover-revealed 'Add to Cart' button that navigates to the product detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/SuitabilityCheck: A form component that calculates and displays a suitability score (0–100) for a product based on user-selected skin tone, body type, and occasion, with personalized styling tips.
frontend/src/components/VirtualTryOn.tsx: A virtual try-on component that lets users upload a photo and select skin tone, body type, and occasion to compute a suitability score for a saree, supporting both single-product and multi-saree selection modes.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Defines a React context and provider for shopping cart state, exposing actions to add, remove, update, and clear items, plus computed totals and cart open/close state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, providing a React context and hook with login/clear functions and status flags, plus an InternetIdentityProvider component.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend operations including fetching, searching, adding, updating, and deleting products, as well as admin checks and user profile queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for a deep teal and champagne color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that allows authenticated admins to add new products via a form and delete existing ones, with an access-denied screen for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/CategoryPage.tsx: Reusable category listing page that fetches products by category and renders a banner, sticky filter bar (search, sort, max price), and a product grid with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/HandbagsPage.tsx: Thin wrapper that renders CategoryPage configured for the handbag category with its banner image and title.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, a three-category grid, and sections for new arrivals and on-offer products fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/JewelryPage.tsx: Thin wrapper that renders CategoryPage configured for the jewelry category with its banner image and title.
frontend/src/pages/OffersPage.tsx: Displays a promotional banner and a grid of discounted products fetched with useGetOnOfferProducts, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Shows full product details (image, badges, price, stock) with add-to-cart functionality, and conditionally renders SuitabilityChecker and VirtualTryOn tabs for saree products.
frontend/src/pages/SareesPage.tsx: Sarees-specific listing page with banner, filter bar, product grid, and a Virtual Try-On dialog powered by the VirtualTryOn component.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: Displays search results for a query string from the URL, showing a product grid or empty state using the useSearchProducts hook.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotReplies.ts: Defines a keyword-based chatbot reply system for a saree boutique, mapping topics like shipping, returns, fabric, and payment to canned responses. Exports helper functions to match user messages to replies and generate unique message IDs.
frontend/src/utils/suitabilityRules.ts: Implements a saree suitability scoring engine that evaluates color, fabric, and style compatibility based on user skin tone, body type, and occasion. Exports types and a function returning a scored recommendation with tips.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with a custom deep-teal and champagne/sand color palette, serif/display/sans font families, CSS-variable-mapped semantic color tokens, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for Dali's Boutique e-commerce app, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, image requirements, and versioning metadata for the saree/accessories storefront.
